case_title: CHIEH WANG ET AL VS. EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $612.54 FILED BY WANG, CHIEH CHEN, KAI-HSUN AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS CHIEH WANG AND KAI-HSUN CHEN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS MUST SERVE THEIR CLAIM ON THE DFENDANT WITH THE NEW COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE
